title: Interview Prep Auto-Trigger — Complete the Loop
description: Complete Gmail-triggered prep: notification on ready, in-progress UI, default opt-in, dedupe, tests.

userStories.title: Prep-ready push notification
userStories.description: After prep persists, create interview_prep_ready notification with deep link.

userStories.title: Prep in-progress state
userStories.description: interview_prep_status generating|done|failed. UI shimmer and Researching pill.

userStories.title: Gmail prep settings UX default-on
userStories.description: Auto-generate interview prep toggle in Integrations, default true for new users.

userStories.title: Prep trigger dedupe and integration tests
userStories.description: Skip re-trigger within 24h. Integration test invite to prep to notification.
